prompt:
Create a realistic production-quality mobile app UI mockup for a Chinese teacher mini-program page named 我的. Target dimensions: 864 x 1536 portrait. Single screen only, no device chrome, no browser chrome. Design direction: polished implementation-ready version of an existing teacher mobile app. Use a fresh light blue-white mist background with very subtle cyan, lilac and petal-pink glow. Keep the interface minimal and information-dense. Do not place explanatory notes, logic descriptions, comments, wireframe labels, annotations, or design rationale on the page.

Product context: C-end transformation, teacher side, My page, school-version user with multiple class sources. Top hero should show a Chinese female teacher avatar, teacher name 刘飞飞老师, school 成都七中初中附属小学, a visible class-source pill 成都市未来实验小学, plus two icon buttons for scan and settings. Hero can use an airy learning-assistant background with pale cyan light, book-page feeling, glassy white overlay, soft shadow.

Below hero: grouped white surfaces with light borders and minimal shadow. Section 管理工具 has two high-priority tool tiles: 学校数据报表 and 生成期末报告. Section 更多工具 uses compact icon grid with 科目管理, 部门管理, 货币发放, 建议反馈. Add a compact row 我的文件 near bottom. Bottom tab bar has 记录, 班级, 我的; 我的 active in clean cyan. Use linear rounded icons, not emoji, not 3D icons. Typography: PingFang SC style, Chinese product UI; body 14-16px, section title 15-16px, teacher name about 20px. Colors: low saturation Aurora Milk palette, morning cyan #58C3CF, moon blue #7F9EED, lilac #AD94ED, petal pink #DF82AA, ink blue-gray text. Cards 20-24px radius, no nested cards, no heavy gradients, no thick shadow. Primary goal: make the first screen useful, calm, and ready for a teacher to use.
